scope: intraday exit overlay REPLAY only; no strategy/live/paper/UI/KPI/settings changes

recommendation.label: KEEP_0855_ONLY
recommendation.reason: No single overlay improved baseline sum PnL by the minimum 0.500% threshold without worsening worst trade. Do not enable any overlay in live; revisit after more trade history accumulates.

caveat: Hourly exits can hurt a volatility-breakout strategy because the classic reason for next-day exit is to let the breakout run. Early exits may cut the right tail. Use this replay as evidence for Codex review, not as a live-enable trigger.
